nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Caribbean Lowlands
nodes.summary: Caribbean Lowlands是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Stub-tailed spadebill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 中美洲
nodes.summary: 中美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联125种鸟类，包括大䳍、小穴䳍、灰胸穴䳍等125种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Stub-tailed spadebill
nodes.summary: Stub-tailed spadebill（Stub-tailed spadebill，学名 Platyrinchus cancrominus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于雨林、Caribbean Lowlands、中美洲，常见栖息地包括热带雨林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is commonly found in tropical dry rainforests or tropical moist lowlands throughout Central America. First scientifically described in 1860, it was originally thought to be the same as Platyrinchus mystaceus but was later reclassified as a sympatric species

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is commonly found in tropical dry rainforests or tropical moist lowlands throughout Central America. First scientifically described in 1860, it was originally thought to be the same as Platyrinchus mystaceus but was later reclassified as a sympatric species

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is commonly found in tropical dry rainforests or tropical moist lowlands throughout Central America. First scientifically described in 1860, it was originally thought to be the same as Platyrinchus mystaceus but was later reclassified as a sympatric species

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: As it occupies the lower levels of the rainforest, it feeds on the small drupes and berries growing at this level. The stub-tailed spadebill also benefits from its habitat amongst the undergrowth of the tropical rainforests as it is able to scavenge dead grass and plant fibers for nesting
